title: DynamicLights
description: This project adds Dynamic Lights as a datapack.
body:
# DynamicLights

DynamicLights is a datapack that adds Dynamic Lights to the game.

## Source Code

~~The Source Code will be published soon.~~ Source code can be found at: https://github.com/DEMnetwork/DynamicLights

The whole project is licensed under the MIT License.

## Known Issues

+ Lighting does not work when inside a non-solid block.
+ ~~Using two light sources, one in the mainhand and another in the offhand, can cause issues(e.g. Water getting replaced by air).~~(Fixed in v1.0.1) 
+ ~~Pre-placed light blocks can get replaced by air if someone passes near them with a DynamicLights affected item.~~(Fixed in v1.0.1)
+ ~~Lighting can persist even after no longer holding a light source.~~(Fixed in v1.0.1)
+ Source water blocks can be generated when holding a underwater light source when in non-source water block.

## Why DynamicLights

DynamicLights is fully server-side, doesn't require client-side mods. Works with Vanilla Minecraft.

## DynamicLights Affected Items

+ Torch(Only on surface)
+ Lantern(Only on surface)
+ Sea Pickle(Only underwater)
